title: Which Transparent Star Resident Are You?
subtitle: Find out what kind of resident you would become on Transparent Star.

visibility.label: Do you let others see the real you?
visibility.labelCn: 你願意讓別人看見你嗎？

activity.label: Do you keep your presence alive online?
activity.labelCn: 你會保持自己在線上的存在感嗎？

relation.label: Do you reach out to people around you?
relation.labelCn: 你會主動靠近身邊的人嗎？

voice.label: Do you say what you really mean?
voice.labelCn: 你會說出心裡真正想說的話嗎？

questions.text: You post a photo you really like, but after an hour no one has liked it.
questions.textCn: 你發了一張自己很滿意的照片，過了一小時沒人點讚。

right.label: Leave it — it's for myself anyway
right.labelCn: 留著，本來就是發給自己看的

questions.text: A group chat is doing introductions. Everyone's already said something.
questions.textCn: 你被拉進一個新群，大家都在自我介紹。

left.label: Say a quick hi and introduce yourself
left.labelCn: 打個招呼，簡單介紹自己

questions.text: Everyone's posting year-end summaries. You have things you'd like to share too.
questions.textCn: 大家都在發年度回顧，你也有一些想說的。

left.label: Not necessary — no one needs to know everything
left.labelCn: 算了，不用什麼都讓別人知道

right.label: Write one too — it's nice to record the year
right.labelCn: 也寫一篇，記錄一下這一年

questions.text: Someone compliments you in a public comment. Everyone can see it.
questions.textCn: 有人在公開評論區稱讚你，所有人都看得到。

left.label: Reply openly and chat a bit

right.label: Say thanks privately instead
right.labelCn: 私訊道謝就好，不用公開

questions.text: You realise you haven't interacted with anyone today — no likes, no replies.
questions.textCn: 你今天還沒給任何人點讚或留言，社交足跡一片空白。

left.label: Scroll through and interact with a few posts
left.labelCn: 去刷一下，給幾個人點讚留言

right.label: It's fine. Not every day needs interaction
right.labelCn: 沒差，不是每天都必須互動

questions.text: Right before bed, you see a message from hours ago. It's not urgent.
questions.textCn: 睡前看到有人幾小時前發了訊息給你，不是急事。

right.label: Reply briefly so they don't feel ignored
right.labelCn: 簡單回一下，讓對方知道你看到了

questions.text: A friend shares a long article in the group and says it really hit them.
questions.textCn: 朋友在群裡分享了一篇文章，說很有感觸。

left.label: Read it and leave my thoughts
left.labelCn: 點開看完，回覆我的想法

right.label: Seen it, but not sure what to say
right.labelCn: 已讀，但不知道回什麼就不回了

questions.text: You haven't posted anything on social media for over a week.
questions.textCn: 你已經超過一週沒在社交平台發任何東西了。

left.label: Why force it? Nothing to say means nothing to say
left.labelCn: 沒想說的就不用勉強，不急

right.label: Share something small — just to keep a presence
right.labelCn: 隨便發點什麼，保持一點存在感

questions.text: A friend suddenly messages: 'I'm having a really bad day.' But you're swamped.
questions.textCn: 朋友突然說「今天心情很差」，但你手邊正在忙。

left.label: Pause and listen properly first
left.labelCn: 先放下手邊事，好好聽他說完

right.label: Send a hug sticker and say 'let's talk later'
right.labelCn: 先發個抱抱貼圖，說忙完再聊

questions.text: You see a post from an old friend you haven't talked to in months. They seem down.
questions.textCn: 看到一個幾個月沒聯絡的朋友發了動態，看起來過得不太好。

left.label: Don't know what to say — just scroll past
left.labelCn: 不知道怎麼開口，默默滑過去

right.label: DM them: 'Hey, how have you been?'

questions.text: Someone says something in a group chat. Minutes pass. No one replies.
questions.textCn: 有人在群裡說了一句話，過了好幾分鐘都沒人回應。

left.label: Jump in — don't let them feel invisible
left.labelCn: 回他一句，不要讓他一個人尷尬

right.label: Wait for someone else to reply first
right.labelCn: 等別人先回，我不擅長接話

questions.text: A friend invites you out this weekend, but you're already drained from the week.
questions.textCn: 朋友約你週末出去，但你這週已經很累了。

left.label: Politely decline — catch up next time

right.label: Go anyway — it's rare everyone's free
right.labelCn: 還是去吧，難得大家有空

questions.text: A group chat is debating something, and your opinion is very different.
questions.textCn: 群裡在討論一件事，你的想法跟大家不太一樣。

left.label: Share my honest view and discuss it calmly
left.labelCn: 說出我真實的看法，理性討論

right.label: Stay quiet — it probably won't change anything

questions.text: Someone in a chat says something that bothers you. It wasn't directed at you, but it stings.
questions.textCn: 有人在群裡說了一句讓你有點不舒服的話，不是針對你但聽了不太開心。

left.label: Let it go — not worth the drama

right.label: Message them privately and say how I felt
right.labelCn: 私下跟他說，那句話讓我有點介意

questions.text: You really want to thank a friend, but saying it directly feels a bit awkward.
questions.textCn: 你想認真跟一個朋友說聲謝謝，但覺得突然講有點肉麻。

left.label: Say it anyway — sincere words are never cringe
left.labelCn: 還是說吧，真心話不怕肉麻

right.label: Wait for a better moment — when it feels natural
right.labelCn: 等合適的時機再說，自然一點

questions.text: You and a friend disagree on something. The mood is getting a little tense.
questions.textCn: 你跟朋友聊到一件事意見不合，氣氛有點僵。

left.label: Change the subject — keep the mood light
left.labelCn: 轉移話題，不要讓氣氛太難看

right.label: Acknowledge it: 'We see this differently — want to talk it through?'
right.labelCn: 直接說「我們想法好像不太一樣，聊聊？」
